events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, known for his iconic sound and astronomical talents.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' electrifying frontman, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday, still rocking stages worldwide.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the timeless Mick Jagger. What's his most iconic moment for you?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first ever music video.

angles.name: Radio vs Video
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV launched with that iconic first video. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give it a good run for its money?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis's groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Debut
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and rebellious as day one. What's your album highlight?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place over three days in August 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which performance would you have loved to see?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of 'The King', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 years old.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost The King. His music and legacy live on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Thirty years since we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his incredible impact on music and culture.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 years old.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His influence on music is immeasurable. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Still one of the most recognisable album covers and a masterpiece inside. What's your pick from the record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock 'n' roll icon with a voice that still captivates.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and solo star Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday, still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in October 1975, though it first appeared on his 1971 album.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: On October 23, 2001, Apple introduced the first iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: Music Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years since Apple unveiled the original iPod. It put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed everything. Did you have one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' legendary songwriter and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. A true visionary.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy legend.
